terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using Daily Sync Keeper, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.section2Content: Permission is granted to temporarily use Daily Sync Keeper for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
terms.section3Content: The materials on Daily Sync Keeper are provided on an 'as is' basis. Daily Sync Keeper makes no warranties, expressed or implied.
terms.section4Content: In no event shall Daily Sync Keeper or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Daily Sync Keeper.
terms.section5Content: Daily Sync Keeper may revise these terms of service at any time without notice. By using this app, you are agreeing to be bound by the current version of these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, and usage data.
privacy.section2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you.
privacy.section3Content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this privacy policy.
privacy.section4Content: We take reasonable measures to help protect your personal information from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access.
privacy.section5Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings.
